_meta.description: Autonomous safety classification for all active Jarvis skills. SKILL.md `## autonomous_safe` block is the source of truth -- this file mirrors it for task_gate.py routing decisions. Drift caught by weekly-autonomy-audit routine.

tiers.0: Safe for fully autonomous claude -p (read-only analysis, no external writes)
tiers.1: Safe for autonomous with local file output only
tiers.2: Requires gating -- modifies git, TELOS, or external systems
tiers.3: Human-in-loop required -- interactive confirmations, identity changes, side effects requiring review

sync-handoff.notes: User-invocable -- read-only git evidence collector; SKILL.md disable-model-invocation: true (added 2026-04-28)

telos-report.notes: User-invocable -- SKILL.md autonomous_safe: false; identity surface (2026-04-27 audit)

create-image.notes: User-invocable -- SKILL.md autonomous_safe: false; Gemini API cost per call (2026-04-27 audit)

create-prd.notes: User-invocable -- SKILL.md autonomous_safe: false; collaborative design (2026-04-27 audit)

dream.notes: Memory consolidation -- writes report/log/index/pruned files locally; daily-dream routine (added 2026-04-27)

project-init.notes: User-invocable -- SKILL.md autonomous_safe: false; multi-step pipeline (2026-04-27 audit)

second-opinion.notes: Writes one analysis file, no code changes (added 2026-04-27)

teach.notes: Writes lesson files, may write signals

validation.notes: Writes timestamped report to history/validations/ (secret-scanned before write) (added 2026-04-27)

absorb.notes: User-invocable -- SKILL.md autonomous_safe: false. Slack-poller routine auto-invokes via routine-level gate (2026-04-27 audit)

autoresearch.notes: Creates branches, commits in worktree -- controlled loop

deep-audit.notes: --evaluate is read-only; --onboard may auto-fix Tier 1 findings

security-audit.notes: May git rm --cached or add .gitignore entries

self-heal.notes: User-invocable -- SKILL.md autonomous_safe: false. Max 3 heal cycles, reverts if unresolved (2026-04-27 audit)

synthesize-signals.notes: Writes synthesis docs, moves signal files

vitals.notes: Writes data/vitals_latest.json, posts to Slack #epdev (autonomous status reporter; reconciled to SKILL.md 2026-04-27)

backtest-review.notes: Updates prediction files, writes resolution signals, triggers calibration (added 2026-04-27)

capture-recording.notes: Uploads to Gemini API, modifies MUSIC.md

commit.notes: Modifies git state, requires message approval

create-pattern.notes: Creates new skills, updates CLAUDE.md registry

delegation.notes: Interactive session routing -- dispatcher IS the autonomous equivalent

draft-handoff.notes: Session handoff generator; runs in calling session only. SKILL.md disable-model-invocation: true (added 2026-04-27)

extract-corpus.notes: yt-dlp network fetches; writes scratch VTT/txt (added 2026-04-27)

implement-prd.notes: Builds code with multiple approval gates

learning-capture.notes: User-only -- runs in calling session, not delegated. SKILL.md autonomous_safe: false; disable-model-invocation: true (2026-04-27). Was tier 2 until reconciled.

plan-event.notes: Event planning; SKILL.md author scoped to user-invocable (added 2026-04-27)

project-orchestrator.notes: Interactive session orchestration -- dispatcher handles autonomous task routing

telos-update.notes: Modifies identity files, requires approval. SKILL.md disable-model-invocation: true

workflow-engine.notes: Interactive skill chaining -- dispatcher worker prompt + ISC is the autonomous equivalent
